introSection:
Frankie's Mine Train is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Six Flags Great Escape in Queensbury, New York, USA. It was built by Zamperla and opened in May 2005.

The ride was known as Road Runner Express from opening to 2010.
fullText:
Frankie's Mine Train is a steel kiddie roller coaster located at Six Flags Great Escape in Queensbury, New York, USA. It was built by Zamperla and opened in May 2005.

The ride was known as Road Runner Express from opening to 2010.

Red track and orange supports.

Mine-cart themed train.
